name: Hackathon 2-Person Project
instructions: You are building a hackathon project with 2 developers. Person A: backend/database only. Person B: frontend/UI only. Use Superpowers for planning, GSD for execution. No file conflicts. Atomic commits.
rules: Person A ONLY touches: server.js, database.js, docs/API.md
Person B ONLY touches: public/*, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
Deploy to production at minute 70, not minute 85
